creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
vt newcons ignores the setting in /boot/loader.conf:
hw.vga.textmode="YES"

It switches to graphics mode anyway.
This might also be responsible for introduction of other problems, like attempting console access from X with ctl-alt-Fn and getting garbage screen as result.

See also this bug:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=239244
